description: Phase 36: QuantLearn - Education Platform App. Create apps/quantlearn/ with interactive courses, live classes, certifications, AI tutor, personalized learning paths, study groups, mentorship, course builder, and code execution sandbox.
steps: Create apps/quantlearn/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/ai, @quant/realtime, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantlearn/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/app.ts following createApp pattern with routes for courses, classes, tutor, collaboration

Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/course.service.ts - CourseService class: createCourse, updateCourse, publishCourse, enrollStudent, getProgress, completeLecture, getCertificate, listCourses, searchCourses

Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/ai-tutor.service.ts - AITutorService class: askQuestion, generateQuiz, evaluateAnswer, getPersonalizedPath, explainConcept, generateExercise, provideFeedback, adaptDifficulty
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/live-class.service.ts - LiveClassService class: scheduleClass, startClass, endClass, joinClass, recordClass, getAttendance, getClassReplay, enableWhiteboard
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/collaboration.service.ts - CollaborationService class: createStudyGroup, joinGroup, leaveGroup, findMentor, matchPeer, submitPeerReview, startDiscussion
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/code-sandbox.service.ts - CodeSandboxService class: createSandbox, executeCode, getOutput, resetSandbox, submitSolution, runTests, getLanguages
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/services/course-builder.service.ts - CourseBuilderService class: createModule, addLesson, addExercise, addAssessment, reorderContent, previewCourse, addMedia
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/routes/courses.ts, routes/tutor.ts, routes/classes.ts, routes/sandbox.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/__tests__/course.service.test.ts - Tests for course CRUD, enrollment, progress, certification
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/__tests__/ai-tutor.service.test.ts - Tests for quiz generation, personalized paths, difficulty adaptation
Create apps/quantlearn/backend/__tests__/code-sandbox.service.test.ts - Tests for code execution, testing, language support
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantlearn/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
CourseService handles full course lifecycle with enrollment and progress
AITutorService provides personalized learning with adaptive difficulty
LiveClassService manages real-time classes with recording
CollaborationService enables study groups and mentorship
CodeSandboxService runs code safely with multi-language support
All services use zod for validation
Unit tests pass for course, AI tutor, and code sandbox
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantlearn/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
